goal: Harden M6 export provenance by verifying the current adapter artifact files against ModelRun.adapter_sha256 and ModelRun.artifact_manifest_sha256 before packaging zip or Docker exports. Prevent tampered or replaced adapter directories from being exported after AgentPackage creation. Do not create trained adapters, do not change training wrappers, do not weaken validation, and do not claim M6-RC GO without real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
head: c1ab4da
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or trained adapter artifacts
Pretending a fixture adapter is trained
Weakening model cache validation, verifier validation, auth, or endpoint behavior
Changing training wrappers, runtime loaders, DB schema, or model catalog policy
M6-RC GO/sign-off changes before real adapter endpoint evidence or release-policy decision
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update export-time adapter lineage/hash validation and focused export tests only. Large model/cache/adapter artifacts must remain outside git.
required_evidence: Focused read of training adapter manifest/hash format
Tests proving adapter file tampering after package creation is rejected
Tests proving manifest hash mismatch is rejected
Tests proving valid lineage still exports
Explicit note that lineage/hash validation does not prove endpoint inference
warnings: This gate improves export provenance integrity but cannot produce trained adapter endpoint evidence.
Do not commit adapter artifacts; tests must generate temporary minimal artifacts only.
Do not claim M6-RC GO from lineage/hash validation alone.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped implementation contract for export adapter lineage verification.
phase_notes.audit: Focused read completed for training manifest writers, ModelRun adapter hash fields, AgentPackage preconditions, and export fixtures. Training manifests hash adapter file rows relative to the run directory and store both adapter_sha256 and artifact_manifest_sha256 on ModelRun.
phase_notes.build: Added export-time adapter lineage/hash verification and reordered export fixtures so adapter files and ModelRun hashes exist before AgentPackage creation.
phase_notes.check: Focused export lineage/API/Docker/runtime/parity tests, strict model catalog verification, contract JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed for closeout.
phase_notes.done: Evidence recorded in artifacts/review/export_adapter_lineage_evidence.md. Export lineage validation is verified, but M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

pabcd.approved_scope: Export-time adapter lineage/hash validation, focused tests, evidence, and operational handoff.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No fake trained-adapter claims, no model/adapter artifacts in git, no release GO changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.

pabcd.check: Focused export lineage/API/Docker/runtime/parity tests, strict model catalog verification, contract JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed for closeout.
